microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and **self-service scheduling capabilities** that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud **network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating across security, engineering, and partner teams.

Built an internal AI agent to automate drill planning workflows, **cutting planning cycle time by 39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% — a direct model for AI-powered automation in customer-facing technical programs.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows, conducting customer-style demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by running 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating feedback into actionable requirements.

Reduced documentation lookup time by **83%** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating content to an AI-powered semantic search tool, directly reducing friction in developer workflows.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams across Azure's build and deployment pipeline.

Drove discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — mirroring the pre-sales practice of diagnosing customer pain before prescribing a solution.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments across the software development lifecycle.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping software dependencies across 1,200+ stations in a complex CI/CD environment.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines** — accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and reducing integration friction across build systems.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process through structured backlog prioritization.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by managing end-to-end scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals, streamlining the customer intake workflow through a redesigned CRM process that reduced friction at every handoff.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to better articulate differentiated value to prospects.

Conducted financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify and close margin leaks, delivering pricing model improvements that gave leadership data-driven confidence in deal structuring.
